title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: ipa bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for ipa is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Red Hat Identity Management (IdM) is a centralized authentication, identity management, and authorization solution for both traditional and cloud-based enterprise environments.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): ipa-sidgen: fix memory leak in ipa_sidgen_add_post_op() [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-104857)  Pagure #9752: ipatests: use "sos report" instead of "sosreport" command (JIRA:RHEL-106165)

fixes.description: Pagure #9752: ipatests: use "sos report" instead of "sosreport" command

full_text:
An update for ipa is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Identity Management (IdM) is a centralized authentication, identity management, and authorization solution for both traditional and cloud-based enterprise environments.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): ipa-sidgen: fix memory leak in ipa_sidgen_add_post_op() [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-104857)  Pagure #9752: ipatests: use "sos report" instead of "sosreport" command (JIRA:RHEL-106165)
